title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Frontend Developer in Varanasi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket Consulting Pvt Ltd!
